text:
SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All header claim, line, and occurrence code files 

VALUES: https://www.census.gov/library/reference/code-lists/ansi.html 

Two-digit value (with leading zeros) 
01 = Alabama 
02 = Alaska 
04 = Arizona 
05 = Arkansas 
06 = California 
08 = Colorado 
09 = Connecticut 
10 = Delaware 
11 = District of Columbia 
12 = Florida 
13 = Georgia 
15 = Hawaii 
16 = Idaho 
17 = Illinois 
18 = Indiana 
19 = Iowa 
20 = Kansas 
21 = Kentucky 
22 =
